name: Validation Test Governance — Errors & Warnings by Design
rational: This governance is intentionally malformed to verify that the IOF Validator correctly detects and reports structural and semantic errors. It MUST NOT be used for operational missions. All errors and warnings listed here are expected and by design.
controls: EXPECTED ERR: policy references a non-existent file
EXPECTED ERR: node file with missing nodes array
EXPECTED WARN: node file with empty nodes array
EXPECTED ERR: URL that does not exist (semantic — HEAD check will fail)
EXPECTED WARN: region file with empty countries
EXPECTED ERR: analysis profile missing weights
requirements: REQ-IOF-TEST-001: Validator must report ERR for missing policy file
REQ-IOF-TEST-002: Validator must report ERR for missing nodes array
REQ-IOF-TEST-003: Validator must report WARN for empty nodes array
REQ-IOF-TEST-004: Validator must report ERR for unreachable URL (Deep Validate)
REQ-IOF-TEST-005: Validator must report WARN for empty region countries
REQ-IOF-TEST-006: Validator must NOT produce RFT status for this governance

description.purpose: Validator self-test — intentional errors and warnings
